fields.title: Urban Solar Corridor Installation
fields.description: Deployment of rooftop solar arrays along the A64 business corridor. Includes PV installation, micro-inverter setup, and battery storage integration to supply renewable power to surrounding council buildings.

fields.title: Green Roof Retrofit – Central Library
fields.description: Installation of a living green roof on the Grade II listed Central Library. Work includes specialist waterproofing, native wildflower planting, and improved rainwater harvesting to reduce runoff.

fields.title: Micklegate Habitat Restoration Zone
fields.description: Creation of a biodiversity corridor around Micklegate Bar. Involves limestone wall conservation using low-impact materials, installation of pollinator-friendly planting, and habitat structures for bats and swifts.

fields.title: Clifton Primary Eco-Extension
fields.description: Construction of a modular, energy-positive classroom using timber framing, heat-pump technology, solar panels, and natural ventilation. Includes installation of a mini-wildlife garden and outdoor learning space.

fields.title: Deansgate Low-Carbon Transit Upgrade
fields.description: Revamp of Deansgate tram stop with fully LED solar-powered lighting, real-time digital signage powered by micro-grids, installation of green walls, and accessible routes designed with sustainable materials.

fields.title: Heaton Park Re-Wilding & Climate Buffer
fields.description: Large-scale re-wilding of Heaton Park. Includes planting 1,500 native trees, wildflower meadow creation, pond restoration for amphibian habitat, and drainage redesign to improve climate resilience.

fields.title: Riverside Flood Defense Wall
fields.description: Construction of a bio-engineered flood defense system using gabion baskets filled with local stone and interplanted with deep-rooting vegetation to stabilize the riverbank.

fields.title: District Heat Network Expansion (Phase 2)
fields.description: Civil engineering works to extend the underground district heating pipes to 500 new social housing units. Requires trenching, pipe laying, and heat exchanger installation.

fields.title: Electric Vehicle Hub - South Park & Ride
fields.description: Installation of 20 rapid-charge points powered by a dedicated solar canopy. Includes groundworks, cabling, and substation upgrades.

fields.title: Harbourside Walkway Regeneration
fields.description: Replacing concrete paving with permeable resin-bound gravel to improve drainage. Includes installation of recycled plastic boardwalks and low-impact lighting.

fields.title: Civic Centre Glazing Upgrade
fields.description: Retrofitting the main council offices with triple-glazed smart glass to reduce thermal loss. Project includes frame reinforcement and sealing.

fields.title: Urban Vertical Garden Pilot
fields.description: Installation of a hydro-seeded living wall on the West Car Park exterior. Includes irrigation systems, structural steel support frame, and maintenance access walkways.

fields.title: Cycle Superhighway - Route 4
fields.description: Construction of a segregated cycle lane using recycled rubber kerbs. Includes traffic signal reconfiguration and resurfacing with high-grip, low-noise asphalt.

fields.title: Community Wind Turbine Foundation
fields.description: Excavation and reinforced concrete foundation pouring for a single 1.5MW community wind turbine. Includes access road upgrades for heavy plant machinery.

fields.title: School Playground Depaving
fields.description: Removing 500sqm of asphalt playground and replacing it with SUDS-compliant soft landscaping, rain gardens, and natural play equipment.

fields.title: Historical Market Roof Restoration
fields.description: Repairing the slate roof of the Victorian covered market. Requires heritage-approved materials and insulation upgrades to meet modern thermal standards.

fields.title: Smart Street Lighting Conversion
fields.description: Replacing 2,000 sodium street lamps with energy-efficient LED units integrated with CMS nodes for remote dimming and fault reporting.

fields.title: Wetland Park Boardwalks
fields.description: Construction of raised timber walkways through the new urban wetland nature reserve. Materials must be FSC certified and untreated to protect water quality.
